zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Jean II d'Auxy於1316年5月20日出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯奧勒-a奧時，他的父親Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy25歲，母親Isabelle de Craon20歲。他於1331年與Catherine de Picquingy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年8月26日在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆可雷希--朋提額享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Jean II d'Auxy was born on 20 May 1316, in Auxi-le-Château, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy, was 25 and his mother, Isabelle de Craon, was 20. He married Catherine de Picquingy in 1331. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 26 August 1346, in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Jean II d'Auxy est né le 20 mai 1316, à Auxi-le-Château, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Craon, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de Picquingy en 1331. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 août 1346, à Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Jean II d'Auxy am 20. Mai 1316 in Auxi-le-Château, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy 25 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Craon 20. Er hat 1331 Catherine de Picquingy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. August 1346 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Jean II d'Auxy(이)가 1316년 5월 20일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 아라스 오스이-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Craon(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1331년 Catherine de Picquingy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 8월 26일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 크e시--폰스이외에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Jean II d'Auxy nasceu em 20 de maio de 1316, em Auxi-le-Château, Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Craon, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine de Picquingy em 1331. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1346, em Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Jean II d'Auxy родился 20 мая 1316 г. в местности аукси-ле-чaто, аррас, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Chevalier Jean I d'Auxy было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Craon, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de Picquingy в 1331 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 августа 1346 г. в местности крeси-ен-понтиеу, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 30 лет.
